---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for ParkFlow
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem Statement
A clear and concise description of what problem this feature would solve.
Example: "I'm always frustrated when [...]"

## Proposed Solution
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Alternative Solutions
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Impact Analysis

| Aspect | Description |
|--------|-------------|
| Module(s) affected | e.g., API, Web, Desktop |
| Effort estimate | e.g., Small / Medium / Large / Unknown |
| Breaking changes? | Yes / No / Unknown |
| Dependencies | e.g., new library, new DB migration |

## User Stories
As a [type of user], I want [goal] so that [reason].

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2
- [ ] Criterion 3

## Mockups / Diagrams
If applicable, add mockups, wireframes, or architecture diagrams.

## Additional Context
Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request here.
